description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Looks like the handwriting of Avraham Maimonides. "Forgive me. . . . R. Eliyya. . . . Maʿariv. . . . the dinar. . . . demanding from his wife. . . and the remainder. . . . we will collect on the day of. . . ." Reused on the back for Greek/Coptic numerals.
